title: aira triglumis
intro: Aira triglumis, also known as the three-flowered woodrush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aira triglumis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for different modes of consumption and utilization.
